reasoning: The control MP-2(1) focuses on media access, which can be interpreted in a Kubernetes context as controlling access to resources and ensuring secure configurations. This includes ensuring that no overly permissive roles are bound (k8s_rbac_no_cluster_admin_binding), restricting network access to and from pods (k8s_networkpolicy_default_deny_ingress and k8s_networkpolicy_default_deny_egress), and ensuring pods do not run with root privileges (k8s_pod_security_context_non_root). These checks collectively help in controlling access and securing the environment.
title: Media Access - . ]
